allow: Bash(cp about.html work.html rtt.html tri-lepe.html pages/)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path images | Where-Object {!$_PSIsContainer} | Select-Object Name, @{N=''Size_KB'';E={[math]::Round\($_Length/1KB,1\)}}, @{N=''Size_MB'';E={[math]::Round\($_Length/1MB,2\)}}, Extension | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path ''c:\\Users\\Bojan Adera\\Desktop\\test portfolio claude\\images'' | Where-Object {-not $_PSIsContainer} | Select-Object Name, Extension, @{N=''KB'';E={[math]::Round\($_Length/1KB,1\)}} | Sort-Object {$_KB} -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")
